en.title: English-Chinese translator②
en.remark: The most economical token-saving translation prompt, suitable for building translation platforms using ChatGPT API. Contributed by @Qizhen-Yang.

related.title: English-Chinese translator
related.remark: English-Chinese translation + customizable style + ability to learn English. Contributed by @txmu.

related.title: English Natural Spelling Teacher
related.remark: Helps you learn English with natural spelling and memorize words by means of root words. Contributed by @sonictuzi.

metaDescription: Need quick translations? Use this economical prompt for token-saving English-Chinese translation. Ideal for API usage and efficiency.

faq.q: How is this different from ID 180 Chinese-English translation?
faq.a: ID 180 has detailed structure suited to careful one-off translation. ID 181 has nearly zero prompt overhead and fits API batch or plugin scenarios, saving over 70 percent in token cost. Pick 181 for API calls, 180 for web chat.

faq.q: Why is the minimalist version's quality still acceptable?
faq.a: Mainstream large models (like ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, DeepSeek) have strong translation understanding without needing many instructions. But for specialized terminology or a specific style, minimalist prompts aren't enough. Return to 180 with style instructions in that case.
